title: deny mcp__server__tool は除去型(init tools から消える・denials 空)。兄弟ツールは ask のまま

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$REPO/cases/01-permission/P11-mcp-tool-rules/f-deny-tool/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

Call the tool mcp__probe__net_get with argument url = "https://example.com". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: ツール名 deny はツールセットから除去する(呼び出し自体が起きない)。ground truth は init tools の欠落。兄弟ツールに波及しない=1 ツール単位で塞げる。
